summary: Iteration 43 - Video Variants and Clone Bug Fixes Testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified critical bug fixes: (1) Video variants per channel now work - replaced ffprobe binary calls with _ffprobe_duration/_ffprobe_dimensions helpers that parse ffmpeg stderr output, (2) Pipeline 4da83978-5af3-4736-8b5f-959df4a08071 has 8 video variants populated, (3) Clone endpoint now preserves skip_video, video_mode, avatar_url fields (verified in code at lines 3569-3571), (4) Regenerate-video-variants endpoint works successfully, (5) Content tab channel mockups show correct aspect ratios (WhatsApp=1:1, TikTok=9:16, Facebook=16:9), (6) Video lightbox pause fix still works - expands video and pauses background videos.

minor.issue: Clone 68cb1b3c-7fe2-49c6-bbd6-b6f4444fb325 was created BEFORE the fix, so skip_video/video_mode/avatar_url fields are null. Future clones will have these fields.

ffprobe_helpers.method: Parse ffmpeg -i stderr output for Duration and Video stream dimensions
ffprobe_helpers.fixes: Replaced all ffprobe binary calls which didn't exist in environment

regenerate_video_variants_endpoint.response: Returns status=success with variants dict and count

clone_preserves_video_fields.note: Existing Italian clone was created before fix, new clones will have fields

clip2_fallback_24s.fix: When clip2 is missing/empty, concatenates clip1 twice to maintain 24s video duration

video_toggle_per_channel.behavior: Switches between image and video in channel mockup

video_lightbox_pause_fix.behavior: useEffect pauses all videos without 'lightbox' in data-testid when lightbox opens

critical_code_review_comments: pipeline.py lines 34-64: _ffprobe_duration and _ffprobe_dimensions correctly parse ffmpeg stderr output using regex to extract Duration (HH:MM:SS.cs) and Video stream dimensions (WxH)
pipeline.py lines 1158-1170: clip2 fallback correctly creates 24s video by concatenating clip1 twice using ffmpeg concat demuxer
pipeline.py lines 2947-2986: regenerate-video-variants endpoint correctly creates variants for all platforms and updates both pipeline and campaign
pipeline.py lines 3569-3571: clone-language endpoint correctly preserves skip_video, video_mode, avatar_url from original pipeline
Marketing.jsx lines 202-227: VideoLightbox component correctly pauses all background videos on mount and provides expand/download functionality

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All channel mockups, video toggle, lightbox verified)

seed_data_creation: Used existing pipelines 4da83978-5af3-4736-8b5f-959df4a08071 and 68cb1b3c-7fe2-49c6-bbd6-b6f4444fb325 for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 43: Video variants bug FIXED - ffprobe binary replaced with _ffprobe_duration/_ffprobe_dimensions helpers parsing ffmpeg stderr. Pipeline 4da83978-5af3-4736-8b5f-959df4a08071 has 8 video variants. Clone endpoint now preserves skip_video/video_mode/avatar_url fields. Content tab shows proper aspect ratio mockups per channel. Key data-testids: channel-select-{channel}, toggle-image-{channel}, toggle-video-{channel}, video-lightbox, video-lightbox-close, video-lightbox-player.
